change.diff_summary: Deterministic DDIM sampling (eta=0) — removed noise during denoising

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: Stochastic noise injection during sampling increases forecast variance and degrades point forecast MAE. Removing noise produces cleaner, more deterministic predictions.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Removed noise addition term from all denoising steps in sample(). Each step now returns the deterministic mean prediction. Equivalent to DDIM with eta=0.
jury_reasoning.expected_delta: expect Test MAE decrease significantly by 0.5-2.0
